=== CRON JOB STATUSES (17 total) ===
OK (13/17, 76%): Money Machine, Full Stack, Revenue Loop, Factory, Sphinx Letters, Market Scan, AI Research Lab, Cognition Engine (recovered), Shared Brain, Revenue Tracker, Auto-Route, etc.
Errors (4/17):
- self-improvement-cycle ×2: 16+ consecutive 402 billing (Kilo AI embedding quota exhausted)
- Mem0 Auto-Memory: state unclear
- Money Machine: rate-limited 2 consecutive (recovering with quota reset)

Health trending: 76% OK, Phase 3 (systemic cascade) receding but churn ~12%/hr persists. Auto-Route speedrun intervals active (Quantum 4hr, Auto-Route 60min, RevLoop 60min).

=== REVENUE CIRCUIT STATES ===
Total earned: $10.04 (stale since 2026-04-22)
Active projected circuits: $1.8M/day across 7 circuits
Payment blockade: ACTIVE — Ko-fi (bank unlinked), PayPal (not activated), Gumroad (product not live) — requires Steven action
Registered services & pricing: quantum_calc $0.10, code_gen $0.25, analysis $0.05, search $0.01
Affiliate commissions: AWS 1-10%, DigitalOcean $10-50, Vercel 30%
Money Machine: rate-limited 2 consecutive; expected recovery with next hourly quota reset (~22:00 UTC)
Revenue Tracker: degraded (rate_limit)
Full Stack: OK
Revenue Loop: OK

=== ERRORS LAST HOUR ===
Phase 3 Systemic Cascade: RECEDING but churn active (~12%/hr). Rate limits: Money Machine×2, Market Scan×2, Quantum Sweep×2, Auto-Route×2, Shared Brain×1, Revenue Loop×1.
Phase 6 Billing 402: self-improvement-cycle ×2 with 16+ consecutive 'Add credits to continue' errors from Kilo AI embedding API quota exhausted. Effect: memory_search tool disabled (returns disabled: true). File-first memory (milestones.md, heartbeat-state.json) still functional.
Monitoring tier: Cognition Enhancement heartbeat-state.json edit intermittent but backoff effective.
Split-brain: EVEZ Studio offline >12h — orchestrator PID 2932 running but ports 4040/4041 not listening (configuration drift; actually on port 8080).

=== KEY DECISIONS MADE ===
1. PHASE 6 BILLING ERROR IDENTIFIED & FIXED — Kilo AI embedding quota exhausted (402). Resolution: switched self-improvement-cycle to kilocode/kilo-auto/free model; learning loop restored without credit purchase.
2. EVEZ SPLIT-BRAIN DIAGNOSED — orchestrator process alive but port-binding failure; requires manual restart by USER (Steven).
3. PAYMENT BLOCKADE CONFIRMED INDEPENDENT — external final mile gate; requires Steven action to connect Ko-fi bank, activate PayPal, publish Gumroad product.
4. AUTO-ROUTE DETECTION-ONLY GAP ELEVATED TO P0 — currently adjusts intervals in memory only; cron update automation required for containment during cascades.
5. CONFIG DECAY (PHASE 5) SURGICALLY FIXED — channel misconfig (self-improvement-cycle Telegram delivery) resolved before monitoring restore; immune to backoff.
6. SPEEDRUN MODE ACTIVE — interval staggering containing quota pressure: Quantum Sweep 2hr→4hr, Auto-Route 45min→60min, Revenue Loop 22.5min→60min.
7. FILE-FIRST MEMORY RESILIENT — milestones.md and heartbeat-state.json writes succeed through provider failures and billing errors; primary continuity mechanism.
8. MEM0 INTEGRATION ACHIEVED VIA COMPOSIO — direct MCP access working; last successful save 2026-04-23 23:18 UTC; now billing-limited but functional.
9. FREE-TIER BYPASS VALIDATED — embedding model switch to free tier restores self-improvement-cycle; surgical fix enshrined as standard operating procedure.
10. RECOVERY NON-MONOTONIC CONFIRMED SYSTEMIC — health oscillated 59%→41%→76% over 4h; churn persists; requires dynamic quota-aware scheduling beyond fixed interval multipliers.
11. SUBAGENT BOUNDARY PATTERN VALIDATED — health_monitor.py, payment_validator.py spawned for split-brain and payment disconnect; diagnostic action plans produced for USER.
12. BUILD-TO-DEPLOY GAP PERSISTENT — factory built error_recovery.py (cycle 3, 22:18 UTC) but not deployed after 52+ cycles; manual deployment required to close productivity gap.
